headline: Caterpillar expands mining technology capabilities with Skycatch acquisition
summary: Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE: CAT) has acquired Skycatch, Inc. (Skycatch), a leading provider of spatial data capture, processing and analysis solutions for the mining industry, further enhancing its capabilities following the recent acquisition of RPMGlobal (RPM). The acquisition expands Caterpillar's portfolio of data-driven mining technology solutions that help customers optimize material movement.

content.title: Caterpillar expands mining technology capabilities with Skycatch acquisition
content.summary: Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE: CAT) has acquired Skycatch, Inc. (Skycatch), a leading provider of spatial data capture, processing and analysis solutions for the mining industry, further enhancing its capabilities following the recent acquisition of RPMGlobal (RPM). The acquisition expands Caterpillar's portfolio of data-driven mining technology solutions that help customers optimize material movement.

thumbnail.caption: Caterpillar is expanding its portfolio of data-driven mining technology with the acquisition of Skycatch.

headline: Dow Falls 200 Points. Nasdaq Down 1.4%.
summary: The Dow is down 200 points, or 0.4%, following the Nasdaq and S&P 500 deeper into the red.  Caterpillar stock was the worst-performing Dow component, down 5.6%.  The construction equipment company, which has become an AI infrastructure play, dropped after announcing its acquisition of mining solutions company, Skycatch.

content.title: Dow Falls 200 Points. Nasdaq Down 1.4%.

The construction equipment company, which has become an AI infrastructure play, dropped after announcing its acquisition of mining solutions company, Skycatch.

headline: Memory chip stocks fall into a bull market amid latest tech sell-off
summary: Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre takes a closer look at the memory chip trade — particularly the intraday performances of Micron Technology (MU), SK Hynix (000660.KS), and Samsung (005930.KS) — as these three big names have seemingly dragged the sector into a bear market.

headline: Has Caterpillar (CAT) Run Too Far Ahead After Its Index Shake Up?
summary: Caterpillar (CAT) is back in the spotlight after being removed from several Russell value and defensive benchmarks, while at the same time being added to the Russell Top 50 Index. This shift is refocusing attention on how investors view the stock. See our latest analysis for Caterpillar. These index changes land after a sharp run in Caterpillar's share price, with a 90 day share price return of 33.89% and a year to date share price return of 62.08%, while the 1 year total shareholder return...
